title: SdeNow Dancing Singing Rudolph Santa Red Nosed Reindeer Toy Tweaking Santa Claus Animated Musical Plush Santa Claus Doll
features: 【Funny Animated Dancing Santa】Rudolph stuffed animal has a shiny red nose, wears elf pants and large antlers that come out of the Santa hat he wears,Cute animated dancing santa appearance is good choice for your Christmas gift.

【Musical Singing Rudolph Santa】Animated Santa Claus can sing the New Upgraded Christmas song“Rudolph the Red Nosed Reindeer”.Unlike other traditional Santa Claus,Dancing Reindeer Santa Claus Toy has an exaggerated proportion of a big red nose and ear, which make people burst into laughter after watching.

【Easy to Operation】This dancing Santa reindeer brings the holiday atmosphere to life with lively singing and dancing,perfect as your singing reindeer santa claus decor to add fun and entertainment. Just install 3 * AA batteries of the dancing reindeer is inside the back shirt and turn on the switch on stuffed dancing singing rudolph santa 's hand,Dancing Santa Claus Toy will start performing,which is a wonderful XMAS funny gift for kids(Battery not included).

【Safe Excellent Materials & Exquisite Package】Stuffed Christmas rudolph doll uses safe and high-quality materials and reliable construction process,ensuring that christmas animated figures are both safe and durable.At the same time,dancing reindeer with music package comes with a beautiful gift

【Multi applicability】Dancing Christmas Twerking Rudolph Toy is not only applicable to a variety of companies,hotels,shopping malls,kindergartens and other places to open Christmas party gifts,but also as decorations to enhance the festive atmosphere.
